name: livguardsolar-visual-tests
description: Playwright visual regression tests for livguardsolar.com

scripts.test:allure: playwright test tests/visual/ & npx allure serve allure-results
scripts.test:solar-for-home:allure: playwright test tests/visual/solar-for-home.visual.spec.ts --workers=100% & npx allure serve allure-results
scripts.test:homepage:allure: playwright test tests/visual/homepage.visual.spec.ts --workers=100% & npx allure serve allure-results
